creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your contribution Fynn. 

Please:

1) Use the maintainer-approval flag (+) on attachments for ports you are maintainer of. Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+].

Using the maintainer-feedback flag is only needed if/when set to ? (feedback requested) first

2) Confirm this change passes QA (portlint, poudriere in particular). For more information on testing see: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/testing.html
